network_load.evidence: HTTP supplemental showed HTML 402ms and app.js 373ms on live; local CDP responseEnd 270ms after fix.
network_load.root_cause: Not the main cause of the previous 25s reading.

html_load.evidence: Local first visible UI 115ms; HTTP HTML 402ms live.

js_parse_init.evidence: App interactive 740ms after fix; route switching <=456ms.
js_parse_init.root_cause: Large app.js is acceptable for V1 local smoke; no bundling/splitting done.

service_worker_impact.evidence: No stale cache in prior targeted regression; local no-store server used for this triage.
service_worker_impact.root_cause: Not implicated in current local timing.

app_state_hydration.evidence: MinaApp interactive at 740ms; IndexedDB/runtime load did not block beyond V1 target in local CDP.
app_state_hydration.root_cause: No safe additional V1 fix needed.

localStorage_indexedDB_usage.evidence: No startup delay beyond interactive budget.

memory_search_init.evidence: Memory regression normal/impossible/weak/secret PASS in regression_smoke.json.

scheme_render.evidence: Scheme open 84ms after app interactive; mobile 390 no overflow.

diagnostic_cards_init.evidence: Quick Diagnost 918ms after fix; Direct Bridge public probe 760ms.
diagnostic_cards_init.root_cause: Previous Quick Diagnost awaited Direct Bridge frame readiness path.

artificial_wait_or_readiness_wait.evidence: Previous performance_rerun included explicit readiness wait and complete/app-ready coupling; new evidence tracks first visible, interactive, and document complete separately.
artificial_wait_or_readiness_wait.root_cause: Previous full app-ready number mixed user-facing readiness with load/complete wait.

external_live_bridge_waits.evidence: Diagnostic public health uses quick no-frame/no-retry probe with 1500ms public timeout and 2500ms fallback health timeout.
external_live_bridge_waits.root_cause: Bridge iframe ready timeout was inappropriate for Quick Diagnost.

headless_only_artifact.evidence: Earlier local probe showed visible 347ms/app 692ms but loadEventEnd 21s from headless external resource behavior; after no-store local target document_complete 7ms.
headless_only_artifact.root_cause: Old measurement was overly strict for user readiness. Continue to track real visible/interactive metrics.

code_changes: Added DIAGNOSTIC_PUBLIC_HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS=1500 and reduced DIAGNOSTIC_DIRECT_HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS to 2500 for quick diagnostics.
Added directBridgeRequest retry:false option without changing existing callers.
Added probePublicRuntimeHealth(options) for quick no-frame/no-retry diagnostics while preserving default live runtime behavior.
Changed probeDirectBridgeHealth to use quick public health path before fallback.
remaining_risks: Full live performance can still vary by GitHub Pages/CDN/network and owner environment.
Large app.js remains a V1 technical debt, but current visible/interactive budgets pass.
